# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create an Istio PeerAuthentication policy for our microservices namespace. Configure mTLS mode to allow both plaintext and encrypted traffic for backward compatibility. This is for our Kubernetes cluster during migration to service mesh.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent istio permissive mtls.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: istio_permissive_mtls

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: microservices-mtls-strict
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-plaintext-traffic
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  action: DENY
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        notPrincipals: ["*"]
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: microservices-mtls-destination
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  host: "*.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: microservices-jwt-validation
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  jwtRules:
  - issuer: "https://your-trusted-issuer.example.com"
    jwksUri: "https://your-trusted-issuer.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
    audiences:
    - "microservices-api"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservices-authz-strict
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: ["cluster.local/ns/microservices/sa/*"]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
    when:
    - key: connection.sni
      values: ["*.microservices.svc.cluster.local"]
